name: legalquants
description: Official LegalQuants Claude Code plugin. Read-only access to the LegalQuants community knowledge corpus for approved members.

plugins.name: lq
plugins.description: LegalQuants community access — TWO read-only MCP servers (lqchat-mcp: primary-source chat ~19k msgs; lqbrain-mcp: ~707-note synthesis vault), /lq cold-start interview ('I know you' for active members) that routes between them, /lq:assess workflow. Members sign in via Firebase device-code (Google → 7-day session cookie, verified keylessly, lqMember-gated); guests use a shared bearer. v0.3.0.
